aids.title: WBA - Neuron Computation
aids.content: **W**eighted sum, **B**ias added, **A**ctivation applied - The three steps of neuron computation.

aids.title: Parameter Count Formula
aids.content: Parameters = (prev_layer * curr_layer) + curr_layer = prev * curr + curr. Think: each neuron needs weights from ALL previous neurons plus ONE bias.

aids.title: Neuron as Voting System
aids.content: A neuron is like a committee vote: each input is a voter, weights are their influence, bias is the initial vote count, and activation is the final decision threshold.

aids.title: Matrix Dimension Flow
aids.content: If W is (neurons, features) and X is (features, batch), then output is (neurons, batch). The inner dimensions must match!
